_schema.purpose: Suppress launchd-debugger Slack noise for failures with an open bead in flight. Prevents one-known-bug = N-Slack-pings/day.

fields.id: bead id or short slug for the underlying issue
fields.cause: one of AUTH, TRANSIENT_API, MCP_DISCONNECT, VALIDATOR_REJECT, MISSING_ARTIFACT, SCHEMA_VIOLATION, CODE_BUG, EXTERNAL_OUTAGE, UNKNOWN
fields.root_cause_substring: case-sensitive substring matched against error_signature OR last_50_lines
fields.downgrade_to: weekly-digest | artifact-only — Slack always skipped while suppressed; this hints at follow-up venue

_schema.match_logic: A failure is suppressed if (job == incident.job) AND (incident.root_cause_substring appears in error_signature OR last_50_lines). Cause is informational only; substring is the actual matcher.

incidents.notes: Niche-intelligence Tuesday 22:30 fires fail with bare-claude-CLI error because the plist still routes to `/niche-intelligence` instead of a headless prompt. Agent B (parallel track) is wiring headless-tuesday-prompt.md + validator + plist update. Suppress launchd-debugger Slack until ai-ops-5wx is closed; the failure still lands in the daily artifact for audit.
